# SARKSH GROW

SARKSH GROW is a Hyderabad-based finance and technology company made for Indian families. The public website focuses on market education, demat account awareness, broker comparison, trading-readiness conversations, portfolio pathway awareness and customer support.

Important positioning:
- Education first, onboarding later.
- Made for Indian families, first-time investors and working professionals.
- No guaranteed-return claims.
- Website and free webinars are for general education and awareness only.
- Product availability is subject to applicable terms, internal readiness and regulatory requirements in India.

Useful public pages:
- /how-to-invest-in-the-market-india.html
- /demat-account-creation-india.html
- /best-demat-accounts-india.html
- /biggest-broker-india-right-broker.html
- /free-stock-market-webinar.html

Contact: sarkshgrowmore@gmail.com, +91 83418 89762
